{{DISPLAYTITLE:Birbhouse}}{{Stub}}

After downloading the app and receiving your baby finch, you will also find that your finch has a house. Your Birb will spend either time in the location you're currently at or in their birb house. For example at night, the birb will sit in their bed and dream. By doubletapping you can choose if you want your birb to be at the current travel location or in their house. At night (the time you have set as sleep time) the sky will change in the location youre at. If it isnt night they will also stand or sit on the carpet in their house and sometimes wave at you. You can pet your birb by moving your finger over the birb. If successful, your birb will make small red hearts. The more you do it, you will be able to ascend in the [[Friendship]] Levels. This also finishes a special quest which is to nuture your bond with your birb. 

== Customising ==
You can customise it by buying furniture in [[Finkea Furnishings]]. You can buy items like wallpapers, floors, decor, a dresser , a bed, a window, a door, a carpet in the middle of the room and one at the door. There many different collections of furniture. Also there basic items which are available everyday, like some items or wallapers as well as all the floors. After you purchased an item, it will show up in your inventory and you can put it in your birb house under the matching category. 

=== Favouriting Rooms ===
[[File:Birbhouse.jpg|thumb]]You can favourite rooms while tapping on the heart. It turns red after you favourited it. You then will be able by clicking on favourites to immediately pick out your already created room and dont have to rearrange everything again. As a free user, you are able to favourite two rooms and as a plus you user you can favourite an unlimited number of rooms.{{DEFAULTSORT:Birbhouse}}
